opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My arms and legs feel like they are filled with wet sand, and I am too exhausted to even roll over to reach my water.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I've crashed really badly over the last two days and now I can't even get myself a drink, and I'm on my own.

symptom_narrative.onset: it's built up but it really crashed over the last couple of days
symptom_narrative.duration: the last 48 hours, on a background of years of being unwell
symptom_narrative.character: my arms and legs feel full of wet sand — incredibly heavy — and I'm completely wiped out
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: this is the worst crash I've had in a long time, I can't lift myself
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over, my whole body, especially my arms and legs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, and any tiny bit of effort makes it worse
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying completely flat and not moving at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to sit up or move makes me dizzy and even more drained
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I get really dizzy when I try to sit up, and I've been sleeping about 16 hours but waking up just as exhausted
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had crashes like this before with my condition, but this one is worse and there's no one here to help me
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed and can't do anything for myself tonight — I can't even reach my water

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a long-standing chronic fatigue / ME-type condition I've had for years, that came on gradually
past_medical_history.how_managed: pacing and rest — I try not to overdo things

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: a low dose at night to help me sleep

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live on my own and there's nobody here to help me right now

objective_data_offered.value: my lips and mouth feel really dry and I can't remember the last time I had a proper drink
there's an empty water bottle next to my bed and I can't lift or open a new one
